condition_notes: The most famous quarter-eater of the arcade age, brought home to the Atari 8-bit. This is Atari's own CXL4022 cartridge (1982) — the computer-line version rather than the ubiquitous 2600 cart, licensed from Bally Midway and Namco. A loose cartridge from a single-owner estate of Atari software; used, honest, and untested, sold as found. Loose cartridge (no box/manual); Atari 8-bit COMPUTER version, NOT the 2600 cart. Used and untested — sold as-is.
